gist.headline: Pruning the package
gist.blurb: Swept away an old, unused validation script from the text service. Keeping the codebase tidy and our local dev environment confusion-free.
gist.summary: Removed the deprecated validate-configs script from the text service's package.json.
gist.impact: Developers will no longer be confused by a broken, obsolete validation command when working locally.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Nomnom creature cleaning up the codebase. Nomnom eating an old script/paper to dispose of it.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round nomnom creature happily eating a crumpled piece of paper labeled 'OLD SCRIPT' while the cute bee mascot watches amused, holding a tiny broom. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
